name: anpham-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for software engineering workflows — AI-DLC lifecycle, git pipelines, framework toolkits, and engineering methodology

plugins.name: engineering-toolkit
plugins.description: Core engineering toolkit — 32 skills, 8 agents, 18 rules, 7 hooks. AI-DLC (adaptive intent-to-production lifecycle) and ship-n-check (git pipeline). Mode switching, harness engineering, language-specific rules for TypeScript/Python/Go.

plugins.name: nestjs-toolkit
plugins.description: NestJS-specific implementation of DDD, Hexagonal Architecture, and CQRS patterns. 9 reference topics: code structure, API design, error handling, TypeORM, auth, config, domain modeling, logging.

plugins.name: django-toolkit
plugins.description: Django + DRF patterns for models, views, serializers, security, testing, and performance. 5 reference topics.

plugins.name: nextjs-toolkit
plugins.description: Next.js 14+ patterns for App Router, Server Components, Server Actions, data fetching, and performance. 5 reference topics.
